response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates exceptional breadth and 15+ years of software engineering experience, they are fundamentally misaligned with this role's critical requirements. Most critically, there is no mention of Japanese language proficiency, which is explicitly required and non-negotiable for a team that appears to be based in Japan. Additionally, the role demands specialized expertise in network security (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, attack detection) and embedded networking products, neither of which appear in the resume. The candidate's recent career trajectory has shifted toward web/cloud development (TypeScript, React, AI agents) away from the embedded systems and security domains this position requires.
strengths: 15+ years of software development across diverse domains (web, mobile, desktop, embedded) demonstrates strong foundational skills and ability to learn complex systems
C/C++ programming experience with embedded systems work (NI LabWindows components) and deep systems knowledge through infrastructure/Linux/CI-CD work
Strong communication and teaching background (multiple workshops on web internals, testing, Selenium) suggests ability to work effectively across teams and collaborate with hardware/QA
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency mentioned—this is an explicitly required qualification with no evidence the candidate possesses it
Zero demonstrated expertise in required security domains: no mention of MACsec, 802.1X, encryption technologies, device/tamper attack detection, or network switch products

Recent career focus (5+ years) has been web/cloud development and AI infrastructure rather than embedded systems or firmware; last clear embedded work was several years ago with no security specialization evident

key_factors.factor: Recent Career Drift Away from Embedded Systems
